data.title: Cloud-First Infrastructure
data.description: Microsoft.com leverages Azure's robust cloud infrastructure to ensure scalability and high availability.
data.technical_spec: Built on Azure cloud services utilizing IaaS and PaaS models.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adoption of a microservices architecture for flexibility and ease of updates.
data.technical_spec: Docker containers and Kubernetes orchestrations manage microservices.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Integration of Azure CDN to deliver static assets efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Static content is served through Azure's global CDN endpoints.

data.title: Responsive Web Design
data.description: The website is fully responsive, ensuring usability across a range of devices and screen sizes.
data.technical_spec: HTML5, CSS3 with media queries, and JavaScript for interactivity.

data.title: Single Page Application (SPA) Framework
data.description: Utilizes SPA frameworks for a seamless and dynamic user experience.
data.technical_spec: Employed frameworks like Angular or React for SPA capabilities.
